Author: Nala
Name: Nala DJ Tracker
Punchline: Track your favorite Twitch DJs and streamers!
Description:
A Dalamud plugin that tracks Twitch streamers and DJs. Get notifications when they go live, see their stream info, schedule automatic shouts, and open streams directly from FFXIV.

Commands:
/nala or /dj - Open the DJ Tracker window
/nalaschedule - Open the Shout Scheduler
/nalaconfig - Open configuration
